name: Meme Casino Dealer
description: Custom hybrid template combining alerts, wallet tracking, paid signals, copy rules, public profiles, and alpha fee config.
degenPitch: The full table: alerts, wallets, signals, copy rules, profiles, and tollbooths.
whatItDoes: Combines wallet tracking, alerting, paid signals, and copy settings.
Shows public profile and fee config.
Keeps live movement user-confirmed or paper by default.
cursorPrompt: Build a Meme Casino Dealer using DNA x402. Combine paid alerts, wallet tracking, copy rules, a public profile, and alpha fee config. Default to paper or signal mode, and require receipts before paid unlocks.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Meme Casino Dealer using DNA x402. Combine paid alerts, wallet tracking, copy rules, a public profile, and alpha fee config. Default to paper or signal mode, and require receipts before paid unlocks.
